title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ across time zones is expected.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years experience exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech background aligns perfectly with Finout's cloud cost management focus, deep Salesforce expertise confirmed, and proven track record scaling GTM operations well beyond $30M ARR threshold. Tel Aviv/NY hybrid with HQ collaboration requirement fits Omri's location preferences and willingness to work across time zones.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I came across Finout's mission to solve cloud cost management—a space where operational excellence directly drives CAC efficiency and GTM velocity. With 15+ years scaling RevOps across B2B SaaS and fintech, including hands-on Salesforce architecture at scale and cross-functional leadership that's grown revenue operations through multiple $10M+ ARR inflection points, I'm genuinely interested in how Finout is structuring its operational backbone as you scale toward and beyond your current run rate.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. You'll architect the Territory Strategy framework, manage operating cadence, support cross-functional GTM initiatives, partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory composition, and build dashboards and reporting tools. Requires strong cross-functional collaboration and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. Salary range $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Exceptional match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, cross-functional GTM leadership, and Salesforce optimization are core strengths. Remote US role aligns perfectly with location flexibility, and Gong's AI-native platform resonates with modern GTM expertise.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across the RevOps Manager role at Gong focused on Territory Strategy & Operations. With your 15+ years architecting GTM systems and optimizing territory/pipeline performance in high-growth B2B SaaS environments, you'd bring exactly what Gong needs to scale seller productivity through data-driven territory design. Your track record in cross-functional Revenue Operations leadership and modern sales stack expertise seem like a natural fit for their growth trajectory.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: Warp seeks its first Revenue Operations Manager to work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to ensure the funnel is predictable, efficient, and scalable. You'll inherit a stack built by a fractional RevOps agency, own it, and level it up. Requires 4-8+ years of experience at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with a PLG motion and enterprise sales team. Must be a hands-on owner of CRM and core funnel workflows including routing, lifecycle stages, pipeline hygiene, and automation.
score_reason: Perfect alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise—first RevOps hire at a growth-stage company building predictable funnel infrastructure across Sales/Marketing/Product. Remote US/Canada location works globally, and the hands-on CRM ownership, pipeline hygiene, and automation requirements directly match his 15+ years of B2B SaaS experience.
ai_opener:
Hi [Hiring Manager],

I noticed Warp is building out its first RevOps function—that's exactly the inflection point where 15+ years of B2B SaaS infrastructure work pays off. I've inherited and rebuilt dozens of fractional-agency-managed stacks, scaled them through PLG + enterprise motion, and turned funnel chaos into predictable pipeline. I'd love to explore how I can help Warp move from inherited to owned RevOps.

title: GTM Systems & Performance Manager
description: Eleos Health seeks a GTM Systems & Productivity Manager to bring discipline and continuous improvement to how the revenue organization operates. You'll evaluate, improve, and rationalize systems and workflows supporting Sales and the broader GTM motion. Requires 5-10 years in Sales Ops, Revenue Ops, GTM Systems, or Business Operations in a scaling SaaS environment, hands-on experience with complex GTM tech ecosystems including Salesforce, and strong cross-functional partnership. Base pay range $130,000-$150,000 with significant equity.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise, Salesforce proficiency, and 15+ years B2B SaaS background—exceeds the 5-10 year requirement. Remote US role fits location preferences, though compensation sits slightly below typical senior-level expectations for his seniority.
ai_opener: I noticed Eleos Health is building discipline around GTM systems and workflows—this resonates deeply with my experience scaling revenue operations at high-growth SaaS companies. With 15+ years optimizing complex Salesforce ecosystems and driving pipeline forecasting rigor, I've consistently reduced friction across sales ops while improving data quality and predictability. I'd welcome exploring how I can bring that operational maturity to Eleos's next phase of growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo, an AI research platform used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange, seeks a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team effective. As the company scales toward 20x revenue, you'll replace patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—including lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work.
score_reason: Strong GTM Engineer alignment with RevOps expertise and automation focus, but requires coding skills that aren't confirmed in candidate profile. Remote location is ideal fit, though B2B SaaS foundation is solid for scaling toward 20x revenue.
ai_opener: Omri—I came across Conveo's GTM Engineer role and thought of your RevOps background immediately. Scaling GTM ops from patchwork tools to purpose-built automation is exactly where senior ops leaders create outsized impact—and your pipeline forecasting and SaaS infrastructure experience would translate directly to building the lead scoring and attribution systems Conveo needs as you hit that 20x inflection point.

title: GTM Engineer
description: FacilityOS, a B2B SaaS company providing a facility management platform to mid-to-large enterprises, seeks a GTM Engineer to help build, configure, and continuously improve AI agents across support, success, sales, and marketing. You'll work at the intersection of data, automation, and human workflows, designing how their first AI Workforce—a collection of intelligent agents helping Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success—learns and operates in the real world.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer title, B2B SaaS, and AI-native go-to-market focus. However, the role emphasizes AI agent configuration and automation engineering over traditional RevOps metrics (pipeline, forecasting, CAC/LTV), which is slightly outside core expertise.
ai_opener: Omri here—spent 15+ years building GTM engines for B2B SaaS, and I'm genuinely intrigued by FacilityOS's bet on an AI Workforce for Sales, Marketing, and CS. The intersection of data automation and human workflows is exactly where modern RevOps needs to live. I'd love to explore how we could architect intelligent agents that actually move revenue metrics.

Your approach to making sales teams at HubSpot and Rippling more efficient mirrors what I've been obsessed with: marrying technical RevOps discipline with AI-native workflows. title: Head of Demand Generation & Growth
description: Cresta seeks a Head of Demand Generation & Growth with 7+ years of progressive B2B SaaS marketing experience, including at least 3 years in a growth leadership role. You'll own pipeline and revenue targets, delivering measurable business impact through digital channels. Requires deep expertise in paid acquisition, SEO, website optimization, and analytics; experience with enterprise buyer journeys and ABM motions; and proficiency with tools like Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, GA4, HubSpot, Salesforce, Clay, and Looker.

title: Head of Sales and Marketing (B2B SaaS)
